info.title: Turtlefin OneAPI Platform (v2 - 2.2.0)
info.description:
## Introduction

This document describes the API resources available to promote Turtlefin OneAPI Platform insurance products on your own website.

The Turtlefin OneAPI Platform API adheres to the principles of REST architecture. It is user-friendly: logically organized resource-oriented URLs and HTTP status codes are used to indicate success or failure.

## Authentication

All requests must include an `Authorization` header with a signed token.

To obtain an API key and signing key, sign up on the [Developer Portal](https://developers.turtlefin.com/docs/login).

Example JavaScript usage:

```javascript
var myHeaders = new Headers();
myHeaders.append("Authorization", "Bearer [YOUR_AUTH_TOKEN]");

var requestOptions = {  method: 'GET',
  headers: myHeaders,
  redirect: 'follow'
};

fetch("https://app.skyfall.turtle-feature.com/api/minterprise/v1/products/travel/lookups/productDetails?search=travel", requestOptions)  .then(response => response.text())
  .then(result => console.log(result))
  .catch(error => console.log('error', error));
```

## Error Codes

The API uses standard HTTP response codes to indicate request outcomes:

| Status Code | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| 200 OK | Everything worked as expected. |
| 201 Created | New resource successfully created. |
| 400 Bad Request | Invalid request format or parameters. |
| 401 Unauthorized | Missing or invalid API key. |
| 402 Request Failed | Valid parameters, but the request failed. |
| 404 Not Found | Requested resource not found. |
| 409 Conflict | Conflict with another request (e.g., duplicate idempotency key). |
| 422 Unprocessable Entity | Validation or logical error. |
| 429 Too Many Requests | Rate limit exceeded. Use exponential back-off. |
| 5xx Server Errors | Internal error on the platform. These are rare. |

get.description: You have to pass API Key and API Secret to generate the token. This is based on Basic Auth type of Authorization where API Key will be passed to Username & API Secret as an Password. In response, you will get access_token, used this value as an Authorization token. Please use default Authorization tab for same.

Send One-Time Password (OTP) to the provided mobile number for user authentication. This endpoint initiates the login process by generating and sending a verification code to the user's registered mobile number.

Verify the One-Time Password (OTP) sent to the user's mobile number to complete the authentication process. This endpoint validates the OTP and session ID to authenticate the user and provide access to the system.

get.summary: Get Master Details By Resource Name
get.description: Retrieve master data and lookup information for various insurance-related resources. This endpoint provides reference data such as RTO codes, vehicle details, city lists, insurer information, and other master data required for insurance applications.

schema.default: You don't need to pass the authorization token here. it'll passed by default from authorize section.

parameters.name: productCode
parameters.description:
Product codes :
  * `bike` - Bike
  * `private-car` - Private Car
  * `wellness`- Wellness
  * `roadside-assistance` - Roadside Assistance
  * `mobile` - Mobile
  * `credit-life`- Credit Life
  * `travel`- Travel
  * `lifestyle`-Lifestyle

parameters.name: resourceCode
parameters.description: The resources that needs to be fetched.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
url-encoded query parameters. E.g.
Resource Model Example
rto - mh01
vehicleMakeModel - Hyunda
vehicleVariant make (string),
model (string)

OR

makeModelId (string)

 make=Hyundai&model=i20

OR

makeModelId=155

Get this ID from vehicleMakeModel resource call
cityList pincode (string),
search (string),
insurerCode (string)

OR

-

pincode=411007&search=411007&insurerCode=HDFC


OR


400001
Get city by pincode (applicable only for Health & Personal Accident products)
insurers - -
salutation insurerCode (string)

 insurerCode=HDFC
nominee insurerCode (string),
maritalStatus (string)

 insurerCode=HDFC&maritalStatus=MARRIED
productDetails - travel
medicalQuestions insurerCode(String) &insurerCode=KOTAK (available only for credit-life)

parameters.description: Wellness plans that need to be fetched for the given pincode

value.name: Credit Life Insurance
value.metaInfo: Credit Life Insurance is protection oriented plan that provides comprehensive cover to a group of borrowers of the credit / lending institution (e.g., banks, retail finance providers).

variants.metaInfo: The purpose of a business loan insurance policy is to help the company recover from financial disruption as a result of the untimely loss of a working owner or any employee who makes a substantial contribution to the business.
A loan against property(LAP) is a secured loan that is sanctioned against the asset pledged as collateral
A home loan is a secured loan that is obtained to purchase a property by offering it as collateral.
